slides.action_title: Gate the S/4HANA cutover on field-mapping completeness
Recommendation: block cutover until field mapping is ≥98% complete
Conversions fail late because table sign-off hides field-level gaps
Higher mapping completeness coincides with 14× fewer cutover defects
A completeness gate is cheap insurance versus a failed cutover

appendix.action_title: Defect–completeness data is stable across band definitions

notes: Answer-first for a senior, time-pressed committee: lead with the recommendation, then support.
